zh.Sockburn, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆索可本
zh.Dilston, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德迪爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.於大約1491年出生在英國達勒姆索可本時，他的父親Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.24歲，母親Anne Markenfield22歲。他於大約1510年與Margaret Radcliffe在英國諾圖波藍德迪爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年6月在英國英格蘭達勒姆索可本享年30歲。

zh-hans.Sockburn, Durham, England: 英国英格兰達勒姆索可本
zh-hans.Dilston, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德迪爾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.于大约1491年出生在英国達勒姆索可本时，他的父亲Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.24岁，母亲Anne Markenfield22岁。他于大约1510年与Margaret Radcliffe在英国諾圖波藍德迪爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年6月在英国英格兰達勒姆索可本享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. was born about 1491, in Sockburn, Durham, England, his father, Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq., was 24 and his mother, Anne Markenfield, was 22. He married Margaret Radcliffe about 1510, in Dilston, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in June 1520, in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. est né environ 1491, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq., avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Markenfield, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Radcliffe environ 1510, à Dilston, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en juin 1520, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. um 1491 in Sockburn, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. 24 und seine Mutter Anne Markenfield 22. Er hat um 1510 in Dilston, Northumberland, England Margaret Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juni 1520 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. è nato il circa 1491 nel Sockburn, Durham, England, il suo padre, Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq., aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Anne Markenfield, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Radcliffe circa 1510, nel Dilston, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel giugno 1520, nel Sockburn, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Sockburn, Durham, England: イギリスイギリスダルハムソクブルン
ja.of Sockbourne, Durham, Eng: イギリスイギリスダルハム
ja.Dilston, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドデルストン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.が約1491年にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで生まれた時，父Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.は24歳，母Anne Markenfieldは22歳であった。約1510年にイギリスノースウンバーランドデルストンでMargaret Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年6月にイギリスイギリスダルハムソクブルンで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Conyers Knt.(이)가 대략 1491년 영국 뒤람 속번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq.(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Markenfield(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 노르스벌랜드 디스턴에서 Margaret Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 속번에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sockburn, Durham, England: Sockburn, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1491, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq., tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Markenfield, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Radcliffe aproximadamente 1510, em Dilston, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em junho de 1520, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. родился около 1491 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq. было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Markenfield, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Radcliffe около 1510 г. в местности дилстон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер июнь 1520 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Conyers Knt. nació aproximadamente 1491, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Conyers of Sockburn, Esq., tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Markenfield, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Radcliffe aproximadamente 1510, en Dilston, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en junio de 1520, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
